_comment: Alien franchise data for Franchise Navigator
description: H.R. Giger's biomechanical nightmare spanning four decades — films, games, comics, novels, and TV. Core series, AvP crossovers, and the Prometheus/Covenant prequel thread.

media.title: Alien (Atari 2600)
media.description: Original Pac-Man-style maze game tie-in.

media.title: Alien (CRL)
media.description: Text adventure with graphics based on the first film.

media.title: Aliens (Electric Dreams)
media.description: Top-down shooter loosely based on the Cameron film.

media.title: Aliens vs Predator (SNES)
media.description: Beat-em-up. First AvP game. Best SNES Alien title.

media.title: Alien 3 (Genesis)
media.description: Run-and-gun loosely based on the film. Better than the film.

media.title: Alien 3 (SNES)
media.description: SNES port of the Genesis Alien 3 run-and-gun.

media.title: Alien 3 (Game Boy)
media.description: Cut-down Game Boy port of Alien 3.

media.title: Aliens vs Predator (Atari Jaguar)
media.description: First-person AvP on Jaguar. Revolutionary at release.

media.title: Aliens vs Predator (1999)
media.description: Three campaigns (Marine, Alien, Predator). Best AvP game ever made.

media.title: Aliens vs Predator 2
media.description: Story-rich AvP sequel by Monolith. Requires community patch.

media.title: Alien Resurrection (PS1)
media.description: First-person shooter based on the fourth film.

media.title: Aliens: Extermination
media.description: Light-gun arcade game.

media.title: Aliens vs Predator: Extinction
media.description: RTS on console. Surprisingly deep.

media.title: Aliens vs Predator: Requiem (PSP)
media.description: AvPR film tie-in on PSP. Below average.

media.title: Aliens: Armageddon
media.description: Light-gun arcade sequel.

media.title: Aliens vs Predator (2010)
media.description: Modern AvP with three campaigns. Solid but not AvP1.

media.title: Aliens: Colonial Marines
media.description: Infamously disappointing. Use FixAliensCM mod.

media.title: Alien: Isolation
media.description: Amanda Ripley. Sevastopol Station. The definitive Alien game.

media.title: Alien: Isolation (Mobile)
media.description: Cut-down mobile port of Alien: Isolation. Removed from stores.
media.notes: DEFUNCT. Sideload APK only. Only Nightmare DLC content.

media.title: Alien: Covenant VR
media.developer: Ridley Scott Creative Group / MPC VR
media.description: Film promotional VR experience. Removed from sale.

media.title: Alien: Blackout
media.description: Five Nights-style panic management. Amanda Ripley. Canon sequel to Isolation.

media.title: Aliens: Fireteam Elite
media.description: Third-person co-op horde shooter. Online still active.

media.title: Aliens: Dark Descent
media.description: Real-time tactics. Colonial Marines done right. Excellent.

media.title: Alien: Earth (FX / Hulu)
media.description: Noah Hawley's acclaimed FX series. Set on Earth before the original film.
media.notes: S2 renewed. Best Alien TV ever made.

media.title: Alien
media.description: Ridley Scott's original. H.R. Giger designs. Ellen Ripley. Essential.

media.title: Aliens
media.description: James Cameron's military action sequel. Colonial Marines.

media.title: Alien 3
media.description: Fincher's troubled follow-up. Watch Assembly Cut.

media.title: Alien Resurrection
media.description: Clone Ripley in the far future. Jeunet / Whedon.

media.title: Alien vs Predator
media.description: Paul W.S. Anderson. PG-13 crossover.

media.title: Aliens vs Predator: Requiem
media.description: Brothers Strause. R-rated. Widely considered worst in both franchises.

media.title: Prometheus
media.description: Ridley Scott prequel. Engineers. David the android.

media.title: Alien: Covenant
media.description: David creates the Xenomorph strain. Second prequel.

media.title: Alien: Romulus
media.description: Fede Álvarez. Set between Alien and Aliens. Best since Aliens.
